subject: Mathematics
title: Clock Arithmetic
description: A quick win: understand Clock Arithmetic.

hook.text: If it's 10 o'clock and you add five hours, you get 3 o'clock, not 15.

buildup.text: Clocks wrap around at 12. In math, this wrapping is called modular arithmetic.

discovery.text: We write 17 mod 12 = 5, because 17 leaves a remainder of 5 when divided by 12.

twist.text: Modular arithmetic isn't just for clocks. It drives computer science and cryptography.

climax.text: Every time your phone encrypts a message, it runs thousands of modular calculations.

punchline.text: Clocks taught math how to wrap around.
